title: 3' Azide labelling with TdT
author: Benjamin Emert
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qnmdvc6

steps.title: Prepare TdT Reaction Mix
steps.instruction: Prepare TdT reaction mix by combining 10x Terminal transferase buffer, 2.5mM CoCl2, 400μM template oligo, 10mM N6(6-azido)hexyl-3'-dATP, recombinant TdT (20U/μL), and nuclease free water.

steps.title: Incubate Reaction
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction mix at 37ºC overnight in a thermal cycler.

steps.title: Precipitate Oligo
steps.instruction: Add 1/10th volume of 3M sodium acetate and 3x volume of 200 proof ethanol to precipitate the azide labelled oligo. (Optional: To remove excess N6-(6-azido)hexyl-3'-dATP, use 1/2 volume 7.5M ammonium acetate instead of sodium acetate).

steps.title: Chill for Precipitation
steps.instruction: Place the solution at -80ºC for 1 hour to further aid precipitation. Incubation at -20ºC or -80ºC for a longer duration is also acceptable.

steps.title: Pellet Oligo
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 x g for 10 minutes to pellet the oligo.

steps.title: Remove Supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the supernatant, ensuring not to disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Wash Pellet
steps.instruction: Wash the sample with 500 μL of 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Spin Down Wash
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 x g for 2-5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove Wash Supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the supernatant, ensuring not to disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Final Spin
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 x g for 1 minute to collect any remaining supernatant from the lid and walls.

steps.title: Dry Pellet
steps.instruction: Remove the remaining supernatant, then dry the pellet under vacuum or ambient air.

steps.title: Resuspend Pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1.8 μL of nuclease free water to dissolve the dry pellet. Let it sit at room temperature for at least 20 minutes. (Note: This volume assumes ~10% loss; precise final concentration measurement is possible, but be aware of residual dATP).

steps.title: Store Oligo
steps.instruction: Store the azide modified oligo at -20ºC indefinitely.
